items.name: Black Sigil Destroy SV6 Katana
items.description:
Black Sigilism SV6 Katana — Roblox UGC katana that goes crazy. Black, chrome-sheen edge with gothic-distressed scars; looks like a cursed sigil welded to steel. Built for dark avatars: goth/emo/punk fits, ninja core, anime blades fans. Straight handle, light swing, spider-spine details for that tribal/cross vibe. Pairs with Black/Chrome accessories, Tribal marks, Ninja masks, Elite Rockstar outfits. Use it for combat, RP, thumbnails, or just flexing catalog drip. Clean silhouette, messy texture — pure SV6 energy. Cop it and pull up like a fallen samurai.

Find more similar UGC items Here 👇
https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=saintvictim666&salesTypeFilter=1

items.name: JUMPSUIT FLOURESCENT
items.description:
Jumpsuit Flourescent Adolescent menghadirkan nuansa edgy dan futuristik dengan sentuhan streetwear yang kuat. Berwarna hitam pekat , jumpsuit ini dilengkapi garis aksen putih yang mengikuti kontur tubuh, memberikan kesan ramping dan dinamis. Materialnya terlihat kokoh namun fleksibel, cocok untuk aktivitas aktif maupun tampilan fashion statement.
Detail utilitarian seperti kantong di bagian dada dan lutut menambah kesan fungsional sekaligus maskulin. Tulisan merah mencolok di bagian bawah kaki bertuliskan “let it flo, nothing can stop us” menjadi highlight utama, merepresentasikan semangat kebebasan, keberanian, dan jiwa muda yang tidak mudah dibatasi.
Dengan kerah pendek dan resleting depan, jumpsuit ini memadukan kenyamanan dan gaya modern. Flourescent Adolescent cocok untuk kamu yang ingin tampil berani, berbeda, dan penuh karakter—baik di panggung, event kreatif, maupun gaya street fashion sehari-hari.

items.name: White 2000s Washed Out Suede Boots
items.description:
Step into the past with a modern twist in these cute silk boots, inspired by the bold fashion of the 2000s! With their luxe, silky texture and chic design, these boots bring a touch of glamour and nostalgia to any look. Perfect for adding a pop of Y2K flair, they’re versatile enough to dress up any outfit, whether you're going for playful or polished. Show off your style with these effortlessly cool boots that take you straight back to the iconic fashion of the early 2000s!

Made for it-girl body (Elevated) :


Join Fashion Diaries for recolors and many more items! <3 :
